items.title: Atrium Therapeutics Launches With $270M for RNA Therapies Addressing Rare Cardio Conditions

items.title: AI Giant Anthropic Says It ‘Cannot in Good Conscience’ Agree to Pentagon Demands
items.description: The Pentagon has threatened to deem the AI firm a supply chain risk, something CEO Dario Amodei says is contradictory.
